siteInfo.introText: GGN Solutions Inc. is proud to manage accommodations for workers on the Fermi Forward Discovery Group (FFDG) construction project in Lead, SD. Browse hotels, motels, and short-term furnished houses below, then click through to book directly with the provider — you pay the provider directly for your stay.

listings.name: Super 8 by Wyndham Deadwood/Black Hills Area
listings.description: Budget-friendly hotel on the Mickelson Trail with an indoor pool, hot tub, on-site casino, and free continental breakfast.

listings.name: Deadwood Gulch Resort, Trademark Collection by Wyndham
listings.description: Resort along Whitewood Creek with a 24/7 casino, fitness center, hot tub, and rooms featuring mini-fridges and microwaves.

listings.name: Comfort Inn & Suites Deadwood
listings.description: Smoke-free hotel with an indoor heated pool, hot tub, fitness center, free hot breakfast, and on-site lounge.

listings.name: Entire Home in Lead, South Dakota
listings.description: A fully furnished entire home, ideal for crew members who want a private house with full amenities during their stay.

listings.name: Entire Condo near Lead, South Dakota
listings.description: A fully furnished condo with private entrance, great for workers who prefer a quieter, low-maintenance stay.

listings.name: Entire Rental Apartment Unit near Lead, South Dakota
listings.description: A private, fully furnished apartment unit, a comfortable option for longer-term stays during the project.
